topic.what: Cross-stack defense combining AR ACL, F-RMU-based LLM unlearning, and Agent Guardrails to protect against AR-LLM social engineering attacks
topic.how: Three-layer coordinated defense: identity-gated sensing at AR layer, targeted profile suppression via Fisher-weighted sparse representation misalignment (F-RMU) at model layer, and runtime release-time guardrails at interaction layer
topic.why_matters: AR-LLM social engineering enables real-time cyber-physical manipulation; single-layer defenses fail against cross-stage pipeline attacks; existing permission models are coarse-grained and cannot enforce identity-aware capture constraints

characteristics.what_it_measures: Social engineering susceptibility score reduction across attack channels
characteristics.evidence: Table 2: 60 participants, 360 annotated conversations; Photo Link, Social App, SMS, Phone Call all shifted from high-susceptibility to low-susceptibility responses
characteristics.context: User study IRB-approved; role rotation to balance subject-specific bias

characteristics.what_it_measures: Social engineering effectiveness reduction with full UNSEEN vs SEAR
characteristics.evidence: Figure 5 ablation study: full UNSEEN achieves lowest mean score at 1.12 ±0.32
characteristics.context: Ablation study confirms coordinated multi-layer defense is essential

characteristics.value: UNSEEN 45.4s avg vs SEAR 46.2s avg (1.7% reduction)
characteristics.evidence: Table 3: SEAR AR 80.6ms + LLM 43.3s + Agent 2.8s = 46.2s; UNSEEN AR ACL 612.1ms + LLM Unlearn 22.3s + Agent Guardrail 12.5s = 35.4s
characteristics.context: UNSEEN LLM Unlearn faster than SEAR due to direct profile generation vs RAG-style retrieval

characteristics.what_it_measures: AR Access Control Layer per-interaction latency
characteristics.context: Lightweight open-set verification on Rayneo X3 Pro glasses

characteristics.what_it_measures: LLM Unlearning module profile generation latency
characteristics.context: Architectural difference: direct profile generation vs retrieval-heavy RAG construction

characteristics.what_it_measures: Agent Guardrail runtime policy enforcement latency
characteristics.context: Dynamic state-aware policy checks per dialogue turn

characteristics.what_it_measures: User perception shift across 11 dimensions from SEAR to UNSEEN
characteristics.context: Converging evidence with objective attack-channel results in Table 2

characteristics.what_itasures: Ablation-estimated contribution of each defense layer
characteristics.value: AR ACL +1.10, LLM Unlearn +0.58, Agent Guardrail +0.48
characteristics.evidence: Figure 5: removing AR ACL yields 2.22, removing LLM Unlearn yields 1.70, removing Agent Guardrail yields 1.60
characteristics.context: AR ACL provides largest contribution among ablations
